## Mars Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Autosavant (Cost: 3 Glory)

Only an Adeptus Mechanicus, Adeptus Ministorum, Inquisition, or Rogue Trader Warband can take this Mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Autosavant | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \-1 | \-1 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Autosavant is equipped with Standard Armour and a Bludgeon. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

**Abilities**

* **Immovable.** The Autosavant cannot be forced to move by any enemy model.  
* **Irrefutable Report.** After you activate the Autosavant, you decide the next 3 models to activate, following the normal limits (i.e. the second will usually be your own model again). If you choose a model in a Fireteam, the model's owner decides if it will activate as a Fireteam or individually.  
* **Scrivener.** At the end of each battle, if the Autosavant was not taken Out of Action, you gain 1 Glory.

**Keywords**  
LIMITED POTENTIAL, MECHANICUS

#### 0-1 Combat Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Adeptus Mechanicus. Can be taken by Outlaw Warbands as well as Imperium Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Combat Servitor | 5”/Infantry | N/A | \+0 | \-1 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Combat Servitor is equipped with Standard Armour and two Hydraulic Claws. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Hydraulic Claw.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY

**Abilities**

* **Expendable.** The Combat Servitor is not counted as part of your Warband for the purposes of Morale.  
* **Mindlock.** While the Combat Servitor is within 6” of a friendly CONTROLLER model, it has \+1 to Hit with all attacks.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, NEGATE FEAR, NO PROMOTION, STRONG

#### 0-1 Gun Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Adeptus Mechanicus. Can be taken by Outlaw Warbands as well as Imperium Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Gun Servitor | 5”/Infantry | \+0 or \+1 | \+0 | \-1 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Gun Servitor is equipped with Standard Armour and a Hydraulic Claw, as well as one of the following weapons of your choice when recruited: a Heavy Bolter, a Multi Melta, or a Plasma Cannon. If you select Heavy Bolter, the Gun Servitor also has \+1 to its Ranged skill. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Hydraulic Claw.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY  
* **Heavy Bolter.** 36”, \+1 INJURY DICE, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, HEAVY  
* **Multi Melta.** 12”, \+2 INJURY DICE, IGNORE ARMOUR, HEAVY, RISKY  
* **Plasma Cannon.** HEAVY  
  * Normal Shot: 36”, \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
  * Overload: 36”, \+2 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, RISKY, roll on the injury table on a miss

**Abilities**

* **Expendable.** The Gun Servitor is not counted as part of your Warband for the purposes of Morale.  
* **Mindlock.** While the Gun Servitor is within 6” of a friendly CONTROLLER model, it has \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, NEGATE FEAR, NO PROMOTION, STRONG

#### 0-1 Magos Errant (Cost: 4 Glory)

Cannot be taken by an Adeptus Astartes, Adeptus Mechanicus, or Adeptus Ministorum Warband.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Magos Errant | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Magos Errant is equipped with Power Armour, a Servo Claw, an Omnissian Axe, a Plasma Caliver, and Motive Cyberteknika. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Omnissian Axe.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, TWO-HANDED  
* **Servo Claw.** Melee  
* **Plasma Caliver.** 30”  
  * Normal Shot: ARMOUR PIERCING 1  
  * Overload: \+1 INJURY DICE, ARMOUR PIERCING 1, RISKY, roll on the injury table on a miss  
* **Motive Cyberteknika.** The model has \+1 DICE to Climb, Jump, and Diving Charge Success Rolls, as well as Success Rolls to avoid falling off of raised terrain. In addition, the model ignores the penalties of the following Traumas (but not the accompanying Scar) and cannot gain them: Leg Wounded, Muscle Damage.

**Abilities**

* **Mechadendrites.** The Magos Errant can attack with an additional weapon whenever it takes the Fight Action, without off-hand penalties.  
* **Omnissiah’s Blessing.** As an Action with a Success Roll, the Magos Errant can attempt to repair itself or a friendly MECHANICUS, ARTIFICIAL, or VEHICLE model within 6” of it. If it succeeds, remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from that model, or 3 BLOOD MARKERS if the Success Roll was a Critical Success.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, CONTROLLER, MECHANICUS

#### 0-1 Medicae Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)

Can be taken only by Adeptus Mechanicus Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Combat Servitor | 5”/Infantry | N/A | \+0 | \-1 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Medicae Servitor is equipped with Standard Armour, a Hydraulic Claw, and a Servo-Medicae. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Hydraulic Claw.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, HEAVY  
* **Servo-Medicae.** Counts as a Medicae Kit, but the user gains \+1 DICE on the Success Roll to use it.

**Abilities**

* **Expendable.** The Medicae Servitor is not counted as part of your Warband for the purposes of Morale.  
* **Mindlock.** While the Medicae Servitor is within 6” of a friendly CONTROLLER model, it has \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, NEGATE FEAR, NO PROMOTION, STRONG

#### 0-1 Sydonian Skatros (Cost: 4 Glory)

Only an Adeptus Mechanicus (besides Data-Psalm Conclave) can take this mercenary.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Sydonian Skatros | 8”/Infantry | \+2 | \+0 | \-1 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Sydonian Skatros is equipped with Standard Armour, a Radium Jezzail, a Close Combat Weapon, and Ocular Cyberteknika. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Radium Jezzail.** 48”, \+1 INJURY DICE, CRITICAL, GAS, RISKY  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Ocular Cyberteknika.** The model ignores the penalty for shooting at Long Range. In addition, the model ignores the penalties of the following Traumas (but not the accompanying Scar) and cannot gain them: Insomniac, Lost an Eye.

**Abilities**

* **Skatros Stilts.** A Sydonian Skatros always counts as being on a 3” high platform, but cannot benefit from cover.

**Keywords**  
MECHANICUS, STEALTH
